page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A novel method for detecting variants in single-cell RNA sequencing.

A tool for identifying variants in scRNA-seq.

Red Panda employs the unique information found in scRNA-seq to increase accuracy as compared to software designed for bulk sequencing.
